question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many players whose first names are Adam and weigh more than 170?
orig_masked: How many [T4] whose [C126] are [V1] and [C127] more than [V2]? ; [V1] is a value of the column [C126]; [V2] is a value of the column [C127]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM Player WHERE weight > 170 AND player_name LIKE 'Adam%'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Which client issued his/her card in 1994/3/3, give his/her client id.
orig_masked: Which [T3] [C7] his/her [T2] in [V1], give his/her [C14]. ; [V1] is a value of the column [C7]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T2.client_id FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id INNER JOIN card AS T3 ON T2.disp_id = T3.disp_id WHERE T3.issued = '1994-03-03'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Name the tallest superhero. tallest superhero refers to MAX(height_cm);
orig_gold_sql: SELECT superhero_name FROM superhero ORDER BY height_cm DESC LIMIT 1

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is Aaron Doran's potential score? potential score refers to potential;
orig_masked: What is [V1]'s [C158]? [C158] refers to [C158];; [V1] is a value of the column [C126]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t2.potential FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Aaron Doran'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is the region of the client with the id 3541 from?  A3 refers to region
orig_masked: What is the [C25] of the [T3] with the [C10] [V1] from?  [C25] refers to [C25]; [V1] is a value of the column [C10]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.A3 FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.client_id = 3541

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is the average loan amount by male borrowers?  Male refers to gender = 'M'
orig_masked: What is the average [T6] [C34] by [C12] [T3]?  [C12] refers to [C12] = '[V1]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C12]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT AVG(T4.amount) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id INNER JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id INNER JOIN loan AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id WHERE T1.gender = 'M'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is the district Id of the account that placed the order with the id 33333?
orig_masked: What is the [C32] of the [T1] that [T7] the [T7] with the [C1] [V1]? ; [V1] is a value of the column [C45]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T3.district_id FROM `order` AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T1.order_id = 33333

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What are the player api id of 10 heaviest players? heaviest refers to MAX(weight)
orig_masked: What are the [C124] of 10 [C127] [T4]? [C127] refers to MAX([C127])
orig_gold_sql: SELECT player_api_id FROM Player ORDER BY weight DESC LIMIT 10

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Please list the leagues from Germany. Germany refers to Country.name = 'Germany';
orig_masked: Please list the [T2] from [V1]. [V1] refers to [T1].[C2] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C2]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t2.name FROM Country AS t1 INNER JOIN League AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.country_id WHERE t1.name = 'Germany'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: The transaction of 840 USD happened in 1998/10/14, when was this account opened?
orig_masked: The [T8] of [V2] happened in [V1], when was this [T1] [C2]? ; [V1] is a value of the column [C51]; [V2] is a value of the column [C48]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.date FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN trans AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T2.amount = 840 AND T2.date = '1998-10-14'
